design_philosophy: Institutional prestige, academic seriousness, premium quality. Elegant, highly readable, no generic AI templates. Deep Bordeaux anchors the visual weight over expansive pristine white space.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none text-[#2F0808] font-medium
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-tight text-[#2F0808] font-medium

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Use p-8 to p-16 for internal containers to allow content to breathe and exude luxury.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento Grid Protocol (Control Room & Tetris Mix). Asymmetric layouts for marketing pages, strict functional grids for pricing and dashboard. NO 3-identical-icon grids.
spacing_and_layout.containers: No heavy shadows. Use flat, solid shapes with 1px border (#580505/10) or pure white overlapping sections.

header.style: Fixed top, solid white background with subtle bottom border. Logo left, Nav center, CTA ('S\'inscrire') right. z-50.

hero.style: Full-width photography. Max overlay bg-black/40. Headline in pure white. Key metrics (6 campus, 850+ candidats, depuis 2021) in a floating glassmorphism or solid bordeaux block overlapping the bottom edge.

pricing_tables.style: Complex, multi-level tables (A1 to C1). Desktop: Wide, comparative bento-style layout or traditional clean data tables using Shadcn UI Table. Mobile: Horizontal scroll container (overflow-x-auto) to maintain structure without breaking. Use #580505 for highlights and bundles.

campus_cards.style: Large photography-led cards. Aspect ratio 4:3 or 16:9. Subtle 1px border, no box-shadow. Hover effect: slight scale of image, text remains static. Include map/location pin.

department_cards.style: Varied bento grid. Span-2 for main departments, Span-1 for others. Do NOT use identical repeating columns.

buttons.primary: bg-[#580505] text-white hover:bg-[#540000] px-6 py-3 rounded-none transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-[#580505] text-[#580505] hover:bg-[#FAFAFA] transition-all duration-300

footer.style: Deep background (#450000 or #2F0808) with white text. Clean columns, MULTIPLIKATOR logo, prominent.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Text color shifts slightly, background dims. Explicitly define hover states.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Subtle, 0.3s ease-in-out. Fade-in for content on scroll.

testing_guidelines.attributes: ALL interactive elements must use role-based kebab-case `data-testid` (e.g., `data-testid="hero-register-btn"`)

hero_institutional.description: Modern brick campus building for hero or campus section

students_library.description: African students studying in a premium library setting

instructions_to_main_agent: STRICT ADHERENCE to the bordeaux/white palette. No blue, green, purple, orange.
Do NOT use Inter or Roboto. Apply Cormorant Garamond for headings and Outfit for body.
Implement pricing tables with strict attention to mobile UX (use horizontal scroll if needed to prevent breaking the table).
Avoid generic 3-column layouts. Use varied, bento-style grids for features and departments.
Ensure the hero section displays the 3 key metrics prominently.
Use data-testid on every clickable element.
